item.title: Shiloh Ballard
item.description:
-----Original Message-----
From: Shiloh Ballard [mailto:shilohballard@earthlink.net]
Sent: 2005年12月24日 0:11
To: jianshuo@hotmail.com
Subject: follow-up

Hey Jian,

It was very nice to meet you at Carroll and Jim's tree trimming party a couple weeks ago. Please, if you are ever here in SJ and wish to learn more about urban planning, politics and the business community's involvement in public policy, don't hesitate to look me up. Also, of course, if you want to go for a mountain bike ride, Dan and I would be happy to show you the trails-- we have a spare bike. Today we plan to ride, despite all the rain and mud... The local online mountain bike community: http://forums.mtbr.com/forumdisplay.php?f=67

Take Care,

Shiloh Ballard
408-224-4801
